zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Basset於1122年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，她的父親Gilbert Bassett33歲，母親Edith D'Oyly25歲。她和Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1185年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Basset于1122年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，她的父亲Gilbert Bassett33岁，母亲Edith D'Oyly25岁。她和Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1185年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Basset was born in 1122, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert Bassett, was 33 and her mother, Edith D'Oyly, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. She died in 1185, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Basset est née en 1122, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Bassett, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Edith D'Oyly, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Basset 1122 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert Bassett 33 und ihre Mutter Edith D'Oyly 25. Sie hatte mit Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Basset è nata il nel 1122 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gilbert Bassett, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Edith D'Oyly, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. Morì nel 1185, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bassetが1122年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Bassettは33歳，母Edith D'Oylyは25歳であった。彼女はAlbert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchesterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1185年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Basset(이)가 1122년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Bassett(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edith D'Oyly(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Basset nasceu em 1122, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert Bassett, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Edith D'Oyly, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Basset родилась в 1122 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert Bassett было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Edith D'Oyly, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Basset nació en 1122, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert Bassett, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Edith D'Oyly, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester. Murió en 1185, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
